BOREALISCARDS2-BERSERKER_POWER.descripti: Whenever you lose HP on your turn, play a random card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
BOREALISCARDS2-BERSERKER_POWER.smartDesc: Whenever you lose HP on your turn, play [blue]{Amount}[/blue] random {Amount:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
BOREALISCARDS2-BERSERKER_POWER.title: Berserker
BOREALISCARDS2-BLOODY_STRIKE_POWER.descr: At the start of your turn, lose HP.
BOREALISCARDS2-BLOODY_STRIKE_POWER.smart: At the start of your turn, lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP.
BOREALISCARDS2-BLOODY_STRIKE_POWER.title: Impale
BOREALISCARDS2-RUSH_POWER.description: At the start of the next turn, lose HP, and gain [gold]Block[/gold].
BOREALISCARDS2-RUSH_POWER.smartDescripti: At the start of the next {Amount:plural:turn|[blue]{}[/blue] turns}, lose [blue]1[/blue] HP and gain [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
BOREALISCARDS2-RUSH_POWER.title: Rush
BOREALISCARDS2-FAN_THE_FLAMES_POWER.desc: At the end of your turn, deal  damage to ALL enemies. Whenever a card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], increase this damage.
BOREALISCARDS2-FAN_THE_FLAMES_POWER.smar: At the end of your turn, deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies. Whenever a card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], increase this damage by [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
BOREALISCARDS2-ROARING_FLAMES_POWER.desc: Whenever an Attack is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], play a random Attack in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold] and return it to the [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
BOREALISCARDS2-ROARING_FLAMES_POWER.smar: Whenever an Attack is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], play {Amount} random {Amount:plural:Attack|Attacks} in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold] and return {Amount:plural:it|them} to the [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
BOREALISCARDS2-TOXICOLOGY_POWER.descript: Whenever you apply [gold]Poison[/gold], apply an additional [gold]Poison[/gold].
BOREALISCARDS2-TOXICOLOGY_POWER.smartDes: Whenever you apply [gold]Poison[/gold], apply an additional [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Poison[/gold].
BOREALISCARDS2-TOXICOLOGY_POWER.title: Toxicology
BOREALISCARDS2-BEJEWELED_BLADE_POWER.des: The first [gold]Shiv[/gold] you create each turn gains [gold]Replay[/gold].
BOREALISCARDS2-BEJEWELED_BLADE_POWER.sma: The first [gold]Shiv[/gold] you create each turn gains [gold]Replay[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
BOREALISCARDS2-SATCHEL_POWER.description: The first time you [gold]Discard[/gold] a [gold]Sly[/gold] card each turn, draw cards.
BOREALISCARDS2-SATCHEL_POWER.smartDescri: The first time you [gold]Discard[/gold] a [gold]Sly[/gold] card each turn, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] cards.
BOREALISCARDS2-SATCHEL_POWER.title: Satchel
BOREALISCARDS2-RONDELMANCY_POWER.descrip: Whenever you create a [gold]Shiv[/gold], add an additional Shiv into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Play any [gold]Shivs[/gold] that enter your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].

BOREALISCARDS2-SHOCK_AND_AWE_POWER.descr: Whenever you [gold]Channel[/gold] an Orb, [gold]Channel[/gold] a random Orb.

At the start of your next turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Focus[/gold] for that turn.
BOREALISCARDS2-LIQUID_COOLING_POWER.desc: Whenever you [gold]Channel[/gold] a [gold]Frost[/gold], gain [gold]Focus[/gold] that turn.
BOREALISCARDS2-LIQUID_COOLING_POWER.smar: Whenever you [gold]Channel[/gold] a [gold]Frost[/gold], gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Focus[/gold] that turn.
